name: Seafood Fettucini
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Louis Kemp Crab Delights, about 8 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Stir in the flour and cook for a few seconds until it forms a paste.
3. Gradually add half-and-half while continuing to stir to prevent lumps.
4. Cook the mixture, stirring constantly, until thickened.
5. Add the grated Parmesan cheese and continue cooking until smooth.
6. Gently fold in the crab pieces until evenly distributed.
7. Heat the mixture for an additional 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Steam the broccoli flowerets just until tender.
9. Toss the cooked fettucini with the sauce, adding the steamed broccoli.
10. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
Serve immediately.
